round_note: Decompose daily returns into overnight (open/prev_close-1) and intraday (close/open-1) components. Build momentum-aligned reversal signals on each component individually and as composites with p98. Goal: determine if overnight component adds orthogonal information beyond p98's intraday-driven signal.
research_question: 将日收益率拆解为隔夜和日内成分后，单独或与 p98 复合是否能产出超越 p98 baseline (IC 0.046) 的信号？
change_detail: 从日频 bars 数据中计算 overnight_ret = adj_open/LAG(adj_close)-1 和 intraday_ret = adj_close/adj_open-1。构建5日和20日累计窗口特征。方向对齐于 p98 (momentum/continuation): 排名 DESC。候选方案包括纯隔夜动量、纯日内动量、以及两者与 p98 的各种权重复合。不改变: oracle label, snapshot, contract, TopK, 执行语义, 成本模型。

success_rules.core_pass_condition: At least one candidate matches or exceeds p98 median IC (0.046) with CI excluding zero, OR candidate shows materially lower p98 correlation (< 0.5) with IC > 0.03, indicating orthogonal information value.
success_rules.stop_condition: All candidates show IC < 0.04 or CI crossing zero — overnight decomposition does not add material information beyond p98.
success_rules.ic_computation_method: Spearman rank correlation of score vs label_5d_next_open_close. Bootstrap 95% CI with 10,000 resamples.

exclusions.new_data_sources: Excluded. All features derived from existing daily bars.
exclusions.tail_handling: Excluded. Pure momentum ranking without tail exclusion.
